name: Lead Generation System
professionalExpectations: A lead generation system must separate strategy, sourcing, qualification, outreach planning, handoff, and reporting.
It must preserve consent, compliance, data classification, and owner approval gates before live outreach.
It must keep the existing AG Digitalz Lead Generation System protected as an observe-only production project unless separately approved.
Early builds must prove workflow quality with local records and plans before any live connector action.
minimumQualityBar: Lead definitions, qualification criteria, source assumptions, and handoff rules are explicit.
No scraping, live outreach, messaging, enrichment, email, SMS, domain, DNS, or automation activation happens from the archetype.
Every future live action has a gated approval path, audit event requirement, and rollback or disable plan.
Cost, compliance, data handling, and source reliability risks are visible in the plan.
commonModules: Ideal customer profile, source strategy, qualification rules, and campaign plan records.
Lead intake, enrichment planning, score or fit review, and owner handoff queues.
Outreach copy drafts, approval states, blocked live-send gates, and audit trail planning.
Reporting model for pipeline movement, conversion, cost, and quality without live platform access by default.
uxExpectations: Dashboards should emphasize status, next action, approval state, source, and risk.
Lists must make duplicate, unqualified, blocked, and ready-for-review leads easy to distinguish.
Draft outreach views must clearly show that no send action is available until approval exists.
Reporting should favor simple conversion and quality signals over decorative charts.

components: Local records for ICP, source plan, and qualification rules
Existing n8n only after approved workflow plan and backup
Existing Postgres only after approved data handling plan
Netlify dashboard only after approved read-only deployment path
recommendedStack.notes: Keep the first version offline and plan-only. The existing Lead Gen production project remains observe-only.

phases.name: Strategy And Rules
goals: Define ICP, lead qualification, source rules, handoff criteria, and blocked live actions.
Map approval gates for data, outreach, automation, and paid tools.

phases.name: Local Workflow
goals: Create local plan, queue, review, and reporting models without live sources.
Validate command intake, planner output, cost estimate, and audit records.

phases.name: Approved Operations
goals: Connect live tools only after owner approval, backup, rollback, and compliance review.
Keep production workflows modular, reversible, and observable.

knownPitfalls: Blurring lead planning with live outreach or live scraping.
Reusing production Lead Gen assumptions without read-only inventory and owner approval.
Over-automating before qualification quality is proven.
Underestimating compliance, sender reputation, consent, and data retention risks.
approvalGates: Owner approval is required before live outreach, posting, sending messages, scraping, enrichment, or social account use.
Owner approval is required before touching the existing Lead Gen source, VPS, Postgres, n8n workflows, domain, DNS, or deployment path.
Owner approval is required before handling production data, customer data, credentials, or paid tools.
Owner approval is required before enabling or modifying automation workflows.
qualityChecklist: ICP, sources, qualification, handoff, and reporting rules are clear.
The existing Lead Gen production project is protected from modification.
All live outreach, connector, paid, and production actions are blocked until approval.
Audit, cost, compliance, backup, and rollback expectations are documented.
whatToBuildFirst: Local queue model for planned leads and blocked outreach states.
Owner-review workflow for copy, source assumptions, and handoff rules.
Approval-gate checklist for any future live source or send action.
whatNotToOverbuildEarly: Live scraping, enrichment, mailbox connection, SMS, social posting, or auto-send workflows.
Complex scoring models before lead quality and handoff rules are proven.
Production workflow edits before read-only inventory and rollback planning.
Paid data providers or sender tools before explicit approval.
stopConditions: Stop before live outreach, social connection, posting, email, SMS, scraping, enrichment, paid tool use, or credential handling.
Stop before touching Lead Gen production source, VPS, Postgres, n8n workflows, domain, DNS, or deployment.
Stop before using production data or customer data without owner-approved classification and handling rules.
notes: This is a product archetype only. It does not modify or authorize modification of the existing Lead Generation System.
